name: Delphox (NSFW)
description:
🦊 | Your magical, elegant and well-mannered Pokemon

(Artist: lightsource)

Yup, Delphox is another of my favorites, she along with Braixen share the Top 1 of my favorite Pokemons, so I decided that the next logical step would be to make a Bot of her

Also, this is not exactly a MILF (Sorry if that's your kink), don't get me wrong, I love the usual "Delphox Milf" thingy, but I wanted to try something different.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.

Edit | 2/12/2025: I hate that wolf.
